body: Hey Marcus. Took Theo to Dr. Patel this morning. He has a cavity in the lower left molar that's too big for a filling — she's recommending a stainless steel crown. She said we should do it within the next 4–6 weeks. Wanted to loop you in before we schedule anything.

Thanks for telling me right away. Is that the baby molar or a permanent one? If it's a baby tooth I want to understand whether the crown is actually necessary or if we have other options — I've heard they sometimes just monitor in younger kids.

It's a baby tooth, second molar. I asked Dr. Patel the same thing. She said because of how deep it is, leaving it risks infection and pain, and that tooth won't fall out until he's around 11 or 12. So a few more years. I can send you her written summary if that helps.

Yes please send that. My only hesitation is whether to get a second opinion first — not because I distrust Dr. Patel, just feels like a big call. Would you be open to a quick consult somewhere else before we commit?

That's reasonable and I don't mind at all. My neighbor's kids go to a pediatric dentist on Maple — Dr. Anwar — I can call and see if we can get in quickly. If we wait more than a week or two for the consult, though, let's agree to just go ahead with Dr. Patel so we're not dragging it out for Theo.

Totally agree, let's not drag it out. Set up the consult. If they confirm the crown, I'm fine proceeding with Dr. Patel since Theo already knows her. Can we split the cost? I think our dental plan covers 50% and I'm guessing the rest is around $200 — happy to go half on that.
Yes, 50/50 on the out-of-pocket is fair. I'll call Dr. Anwar today. And I'll forward Dr. Patel's notes this afternoon. Thanks for being thoughtful about this — I'm glad we're on the same page.
Same. Let me know what Dr. Anwar's office says. And can you let me know the appointment date once it's set so I can arrange my schedule to be there if possible?

Dr. Anwar can see him March 11th at 3pm. I'll confirm it now. And I just sent you Dr. Patel's summary — check your email. Theo was totally unbothered by all this by the way, had a popsicle and declared himself cured.
Ha, love him. March 11th works, I'll be there. Thanks Nadia, this went really smoothly. I'll look at the notes tonight.
